# AgConn

> AgConn is a bilingual (English / Spanish) farmworker platform connecting California Central Valley farmworkers to verified seasonal agricultural jobs, CDFA/F3-funded training programs, and a portable verifiable skills record.

## Audience

- Farmworkers seeking seasonal agricultural work
- Growers and farm labor contractors hiring workers
- Training organizations and grant funders

## Languages

- English (en)
- Spanish (es)

## Status

Pre-launch. Public landing page and waitlist active. Domain: agconn.com.
